moves.name: Rune Crack Flicker
moves.description: Rune Doll drops into a low crouch, then explodes upward in a rapid diagonal zigzag, striking with her elbow three times in quick succession — left elbow, right elbow, left elbow — each hit angled at a different height as she weaves her torso side to side. The rune-crack scars on her elbows glow faintly blue at each point of contact.
moves.image_snapshot: Body caught mid-weave at the second elbow strike, torso sharply tilted 60 degrees to the right, right elbow fully extended outward at chest height with the rune-crack scar facing forward, left arm pulled back and bent tight at the hip, knees bent in a wide mobile stance with weight on the right foot, head tilted left with a wide open-mouthed grin showing the chipped incisor, cornrow beads fanned outward. Motion blur on both elbows and speed lines radiating from the right elbow scar.

moves.name: Porcelain Heel Drop
moves.description: Rune Doll performs a standing back flip, but at the apex she straightens her body into a rigid vertical line and drives one heel straight downward with both arms locked flat against her sides, descending in a controlled near-vertical drop with full body weight concentrated into the heel strike.
moves.image_snapshot: Body fully vertical at the apex of the flip, head pointing straight down, both arms pressed flat against the sides of the torso, right leg extended downward with heel pointed at the floor, left leg bent slightly at the knee and crossed behind the right calf, cornrow braids hanging straight up away from the inverted head, white satin bow choker visible at the neck. Speed lines along the full length of the right leg from hip to heel.

moves.name: Berserk Rune Spiral
moves.description: Rune Doll plants her left foot and spins her entire body in a continuous 540-degree rotation, building speed with each revolution, then releases the spin into a full-extension right-leg roundhouse kick at head height while her finger rings pulse with blue runic light, the centrifugal force amplifying the kick's impact beyond her apparent frame.
moves.image_snapshot: Right leg fully extended horizontally at head height at the moment of kick release, toes pointed, left leg straight and grounded as the pivot, torso rotated 90 degrees from the camera with the spine arched slightly backward, both arms flung wide for rotational momentum with finger rings trailing blue light, cornrow braids and blue rune beads fanned outward in a horizontal arc around the head. Motion blur on the right leg, speed lines on the rune beads and finger rings.
